That's okay. When you're testing how much traffic do you want to see before making changes to a landing page. In my ad account, I usually wait until I have about 8k impressions before I start making any changes. And off of that, I would like, usually I'd like to see anything over a 1% click through rate. So that would be 1% of the 8k impressions would need to be going to my landing page before I start making changes there. I base the changes that I make on my landing page by how many people have gone to the landing page and then gone to the next step. So generally, if I have a low click through rate in my ad account, I'll make some changes to the copy and the creative.
